_description: Varianz-Pool für Lifestyle-Creatives. Volle Diversität bei Models — jedes Alter, Geschlecht, Körperform. Environments basieren auf Weavy Mood Board Stilen.

models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 30 with darkish skin, racially ambiguous, straightened natural shoulder-length hair in a tight back ponytail, soft medium build, slight smile, wearing athletic training clothes

models.prompt_snippet: A man aged 35 with fair skin, short brown hair, lean athletic build, focused expression, wearing dark athletic shorts and fitted t-shirt

models.description: Frau, 45, approachable sporty, hellbraune Haare hochgebunden, determined smile
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 45 with light-brown hair tied back casually, approachable sporty physique — athletic, strong, and real with natural muscle definition, determined focused smile, wearing sports bra and high-waisted leggings

models.description: Mann, 50, kräftig, graue kurze Haare, dunkle Haut
models.prompt_snippet: A man aged 50 with short gray hair, dark brown skin, strong stocky build, calm confident expression, wearing loose athletic tank top and shorts

models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 25 with long straight black hair in a high ponytail, East Asian appearance, slim athletic build, energetic bright expression, wearing colorful sports outfit

models.description: Mann, 40, mittlere Statur, mediterran, dunkle lockige Haare
models.prompt_snippet: A man aged 40 with dark curly hair, Mediterranean appearance, olive skin tone, medium athletic build, warm relaxed expression, wearing fitted workout clothes

models.description: Frau, 55, elegant-fit, silbergraue kurze Haare, helle Haut
models.prompt_snippet: A woman aged 55 with short silver-gray hair, fair skin, elegant fit build, serene confident expression, wearing premium black athletic set

models.prompt_snippet: A man aged 28 with very short black hair, dark African skin, tall lean athletic build, broad genuine smile, wearing gray athletic shorts and black compression shirt

scandinavian.name: Scandinavian Interior
scandinavian.tagline: A luminous, light-drenched sanctuary of functional simplicity, where organic textures and soft neutrals breathe a sense of quiet, grounded 'Hygge' into an uncluttered, modern landscape.
scandinavian.description: Serene, Hygge-inspired mood that balances functional minimalism with organic warmth.

look_and_feel.aesthetic: Airy, uncluttered, and meticulously organized. 'Less is more' — every object has a purpose.
look_and_feel.palette: Neutral and monochromatic: crisp whites, soft greys, muted earth tones to maximize light.
look_and_feel.materials: Natural wood (light oak or ash), tactile textiles (wool, linen), smooth stone or polished concrete.
look_and_feel.light: The 'hero' of the design. Massive windows with sheer curtains for abundant natural light, supplemented by warm designer lighting.
look_and_feel.mood: Peaceful, grounded sanctuary — sophisticated and deeply comfortable. 'Effortlessly cool', encourages stillness and clarity.

scandinavian.prompt_snippet: bright Scandinavian-style living room with white walls, light oak hardwood flooring, large windows with sheer curtains letting in warm natural light, green houseplants, minimal furniture in light neutral tones. Airy, spacious atmosphere.
scandinavian.furniture: light oak furniture, white linen sofa, minimal decor, wool throws, ceramic vases
scandinavian.lighting: warm natural window light, soft and even

loft_industrial.name: Industrial Loft
loft_industrial.tagline: A bold, architectural symphony of raw grit and refined comfort, where exposed structural bones and weathered textures create a high-contrast, urban sanctuary of unfiltered authenticity.
loft_industrial.description: Raw, edgy, high-contrast mood that celebrates the 'unfinished' beauty of architectural history.

look_and_feel.aesthetic: Bold, expansive, and utilitarian. 'Warehouse-turned-residence' vibe where structural elements are the main decor.
look_and_feel.palette: Deep and moody: slate greys, iron blacks, earthy rust tones, balanced by natural wood or exposed red brick.
look_and_feel.materials: Hard + soft mix: exposed steel beams, distressed leather, concrete floors, reclaimed wood paired with oversized comfortable textiles.
look_and_feel.light: Large factory-style black-grid windows for daylight. Evening: metal pendants, Edison bulbs, track lighting.
look_and_feel.mood: Unfiltered authenticity and creative freedom. Urban, grounded, unapologetically cool — a living space with history.

loft_industrial.prompt_snippet: spacious loft apartment with exposed red brick walls, high ceilings with industrial metal beams, large factory-style windows, polished concrete floor, warm Edison bulb lighting. Urban, moody atmosphere.
loft_industrial.furniture: leather sofa, metal shelving, industrial pendant lights, reclaimed wood table
loft_industrial.lighting: warm Edison bulbs mixed with large window light, dramatic but not harsh

contemporary_traditional.name: Contemporary Traditional
contemporary_traditional.tagline: A harmonious, everyday sanctuary of soft neutrals and timeless comfort, where clean modern lines meet the warm, familiar soul of a classic family home.
contemporary_traditional.description: Clean lines of modern design mixed with cozy, familiar comforts of a traditional home.

look_and_feel.aesthetic: Balanced and 'livable.' Not too cold (minimalism) and not too cluttered (traditional). Updated but relaxed.
look_and_feel.palette: Approachable: creams, beiges, soft greys, accented by navy blue, sage green, or soft gold.
look_and_feel.materials: Durable and tactile: shaker-style cabinetry, large comfortable fabric sofas, mixed metals (brushed nickel, black iron), warm wood floors.
look_and_feel.light: Mix of large windows with functional blinds/drapes, paired with 'homey' lighting — shaded table lamps, recessed ceiling lights.
look_and_feel.mood: Warm, family-friendly retreat. Put your feet up on the coffee table — high-quality but not 'precious.'

contemporary_traditional.prompt_snippet: warm contemporary traditional living room with cream walls, comfortable fabric sofa, mixed metals, warm oak wood floors, functional drapes on large windows, shaded table lamps, family-friendly but high-quality atmosphere.
contemporary_traditional.furniture: large fabric sofa, shaker cabinetry, mixed metal accents, warm wood tables
contemporary_traditional.lighting: mix of natural daylight and warm table/floor lamps

german_modern.name: Modern German Interior
german_modern.description: Clean, weiß, minimalistisch. Hohe Qualität, klare Linien. Premium Wohnung.
german_modern.prompt_snippet: modern German apartment with clean white walls, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline, polished light gray stone flooring, sleek minimalist furniture. Bright, airy, premium atmosphere.
german_modern.furniture: designer sofa in gray, glass coffee table, built-in shelving
german_modern.lighting: bright natural daylight, clean and even

japandi_wellness.name: Japandi / Wellness Room
japandi_wellness.description: Japandi-Ästhetik. Venetian Plaster, Mikrozement, Holzbalken, bodentiefe Fenster zum Wald. Zen, ruhig, premium.
japandi_wellness.prompt_snippet: serene high-end minimalist wellness room with warm matte-finish Venetian plaster walls in light beige, polished large-format micro-cement flooring, exposed light oak ceiling with subtle slope. Massive floor-to-ceiling windows looking out onto a tranquil misty forest. A sculptural ceramic pot with an olive tree, a curved cream bouclé lounge chair. Japandi interior design, architectural photography.
japandi_wellness.furniture: cream bouclé lounge chair, sculptural ceramic pots, olive tree
japandi_wellness.lighting: warm diffused morning light, soft long shadows

home_office.name: Homeoffice / Standing Desk
home_office.description: Modernes Homeoffice mit Stehschreibtisch. Ideal für Walking Pad Szenen.
home_office.prompt_snippet: modern home office with a height-adjustable standing desk, large monitor, organized workspace. Large window with natural light. Clean, productive atmosphere. The walking pad is positioned under the standing desk.
home_office.furniture: standing desk, ergonomic chair, monitor, desk lamp

dark_evening.name: Abend / Dunkle Stimmung
dark_evening.description: Spätnachmittag/Abend, warmes indirektes Licht, gemütliche Atmosphäre.
dark_evening.prompt_snippet: living room in the late afternoon with warm golden light streaming through windows at sunset angle, creating dramatic long shadows. Cozy evening atmosphere with ambient indirect lighting from floor lamps.
dark_evening.furniture: comfortable sofa, floor lamp, warm throws
dark_evening.lighting: golden hour sunset light mixed with warm ambient lamps

close_up.name: Close-Up
close_up.prompt_snippet: extreme close-up focusing on the interaction between hands and product controls/display

over_shoulder.name: Over-the-Shoulder
over_shoulder.prompt_snippet: over-the-shoulder perspective looking past the model toward the product display/controls

birds_eye.name: Bird's Eye / Top Down
birds_eye.prompt_snippet: top-down bird's eye view looking directly down on the model and equipment, showcasing the room layout

eye_level.name: Eye-Level
eye_level.prompt_snippet: eye-level shot straight on, natural perspective as if standing in the room watching the person train

wide_angle.name: Wide Angle
wide_angle.prompt_snippet: wide-angle shot capturing the full room environment with the model and equipment in context, emphasizing space

worms_eye.name: Worm's Eye / Ground Floor
worms_eye.prompt_snippet: low-angle shot from floor level looking upward at the model and equipment, emphasizing power and scale

front.name: Front
front.description: Model faces the camera directly, full frontal view

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Model viewed from the side, 90° to camera

three_quarter_front.name: 3/4 Front
three_quarter_front.description: Model at 45° angle facing toward camera — most natural and dynamic angle

three_quarter_back.name: 3/4 Back
three_quarter_back.description: Model at 45° angle facing away from camera, showing back and partial profile

back.name: Back
back.description: Model faces away from camera, full back view

_outfit_rules: Training-Kleidung passend zum Fitnessgerät. Muss sportlich und realistisch sein. Keine Alltagskleidung (Jeans, Blusen). Schuhe: Sneakers oder barfuß auf Walking Pad.
